description: In this image, a man is sitting at a wooden desk in a room with white walls and a window. He's wearing a blue shirt and black shorts, and he has sunglasses on his head. The desk is cluttered with various objects. There's a beige blanket on one side of the desk, a blue cup next to it, and a white plate in front of him. The man appears to be engrossed in something on his computer, which is placed in front of him on the desk. The overall atmosphere of the image suggests a casual and relaxed setting.
